errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.

auth.title: Admin sign in
auth.subtitle: Access the plumbing store admin panel.
auth.helper: Use the admin phone and password.

meta.homeTitle: Avant Santex: plumbing and household goods in Bishkek
meta.homeDescription: Avant Santex online store for plumbing and practical household goods. Faucets, toilets, radiators, reducers and accessories in a current catalog.
meta.shopDescription: Browse plumbing and home goods, compare variants, and send a request to the manager.

home.title: Practical plumbing and home essentials without inflated pricing.
home.heroImageAlt: Modern plumbing fixtures, faucets, and fittings in a bathroom setting
home.subtitle: Avant Santex helps customers quickly find faucets, toilets, radiators, reducers, fittings, and everyday accessories. Browse the current assortment, compare variants, and move to purchase without extra steps.
home.highlightDescription: The storefront uses live product data from the shared database, not mock cards.
home.guideSearchDescription: Search by name, category, size, or description and jump straight to the right item.
home.guideCompareDescription: Sizes, prices, and subcategories sit together so it is easier to choose the right position.
home.guideVisitDescription: The assortment is built for home repairs, plumbing replacement, and regular supply runs.
home.orderDescription: Start with a section, compare variants, and send a request to the manager.
home.stepOne: Open the shop and find the right products by category, description, size, or SKU.
home.stepTwo: Compare sizes, prices, and available variants.
home.stepThree: Send a request so the manager can confirm stock and details.
home.categoriesTitle: Sections that make it easier to start
home.categoryPreviewTitle: A catalog built for practical repair and home needs
home.productFallback: A current item from the active Avant Santex assortment.
home.valuePriceTitle: Low prices with a practical focus
home.valuePriceDescription: The range stays centered on the items people actually need for repairs, replacements, and day-to-day use.
home.valueTrustDescription: The storefront reads from the same product base used by the manager, so cards do not feel like a random selection.
home.valueRangeTitle: One shared catalog for home and plumbing
home.valueRangeDescription: Faucets, toilets, radiators, reducers, fittings, and accessories live in one store backed by the same product database.
home.closingTitle: Find the right item in the catalog
home.closingDescription: The shop keeps categories, variants, and prices in one place so customers move from search to purchase faster.

shop.title: Avant Santex plumbing shop
shop.description: The same database-backed assortment, presented as a retail shopping experience with search, filters, sorting, and request submission.
shop.resultsHint: Filter the assortment by category, size, and price.
shop.emptyDescription: Reset the filters or try another query. The shop still reads from the same live product data.
shop.cardFallbackDescription: A practical item from the current Avant Santex assortment.
shop.orderBoxDescription: Build the cart, send the request, and wait for the manager to confirm availability. No online payment required.
shop.orderBoxPointOne: Retail prices come from the same shared product database.
shop.orderBoxPointTwo: Once submitted, the request goes straight to the manager for processing.

cart.title: Shop cart
cart.subtitle: Review items and send the request to the manager.
cart.managerNotice: After submission, the manager checks stock and follows up to confirm the details.
cart.checkoutDescription: These fields are required so the manager can confirm the order and delivery details.
cart.checkoutRequired: Enter your name, phone, and address before sending the order.
cart.customerPhoneUnavailable: This phone number cannot be used for storefront orders.

footer.description: Avant Santex offers plumbing and practical household goods for apartments, houses, and repairs in Bishkek. Fast ordering without heavy checkout.
